$comment: ESCC workspace locale template (v1.8.0 currency correctness). Copy to <ESCC_AGENT_DATA_HOME>/escc/config/locale.json and edit — the workspace copy is runtime data (never committed) and survives plugin updates. reporting_currency is the ONE currency every roll-up reports in; fx maps other deal currencies into it. Rates carry an as_of date and source because a stale rate is stale provenance — refresh them like any other claim. Without this file, cross-currency sums REFUSE (safe default) rather than silently mixing units.
